name: Jyoti Gupta
role: Founder - Sculpt Your Style Consulting Training | Coaching | Refinement
experience: Trainer, Coach, Motivational Speaker, Co Author. Certified Organisational Development Professional, Certified POSH Trainer, Certified Corporate Trainer, Certified Soft Skills Trainer, Certified Life Skills Trainer, Former Client Relations and Logistics Professional.
description: Jyoti believes that true development comes from within - when individuals are equipped with the mindset, skillset, and presence to succeed. Her approach blends introspection with implementation, ensuring growth that is both personal and professional. She combines the art of personal transformation with the science of workplace success, delivering high-impact programs that build capability.
achievements: Trainer’s Mastery Certified Soft Skills Trainer from National Institute of Skills Training, New Delhi, India
POSH Certified Trainer. Prevention, Prohibition, and Redressal of sexual harassment of women at workplace POSH Act 2013, POSH Certified Trainer Concept of Living Charitable Trust, Gujarat, India
Educator of the year 2023 from Namaste India Council of Educators (NICE) for outstanding contribution in the field of education
Certificate of appreciation from Mentoria for being subject matter expert
City Excellence Awards 2023 for making positive difference towards the community
International Proud Womania Award 2023 for conducting motivational sessions
Certificate of appreciation from Bhabad publication for being exceptional speaker and moderator
Certificate of appreciation soft skills trainer summit from Leadership Academy

name: B Srividhya Priya
experience: 31+ years of experience as a Customs House Agent & Freight forwarder. MA Economics, Gold Medalist. IATA Course, Rule 9 exam of Customs license.
description: Her journey began as an employee in a Customs House Agent (CHA) trade. With her work experience and perseverance, she started her own Partnership firm STREAMLINE FORWARDERS in 1997. Immaculate hard work and honesty have gained her a special name in this male-dominated trade as a successful WOMEN ENTREPRENEUR. Apart from her business schedules, she engages in social activities like green farming and has been honored in various magazines and newspapers.
achievements: Shakthi Sadhana Award – Women in logistics and custom house agents - by SUDESI magazine
Exim award - being in TOP THREE Custom House Agents in Chennai
Southeast Cargo & Logistics awards Finalists Nominee for 3 years consecutively (2012 - 2015)
Enterprise women of the year 2015 (All INDIA) - by 24MRC Network and IBN7 channel
DR. KALAM INTERNATIONAL EXCELLENCE AWARD IN DUBAI 2018
KINGS BRAND – WOMEN IN LOGISTICS YEAR 2019
Women empowerment award 2024 - On International women’s day at Anna University Campus, Chennai
